name: lab-langgraph-fitdocs
description: FitDocs RAG — Azure Functions + LangChain.js + PGVector (Render PostgreSQL)

scripts.db:apply-schema: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/apply-db-schema.mts
scripts.db:apply-pg-ops: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/apply-pg-ops-schema.mts
scripts.db:apply-filestore: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/apply-filestore-schema.mts
scripts.revisado:sync: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/sync-revisado.mts
scripts.db:prepare-store: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/prepare-store-db.mts
scripts.db:reset-migrate: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/reset-databases.mts && npm run db:migrate-full
scripts.db:migrate-full: npm run data:migrate-from-isa && npm run catalog:build && npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-full.mts
scripts.db:verify-store: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/verify-store-db.mts
scripts.db:apply-schema:rag: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/apply-rag-schema.mts
scripts.diagrams:render: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/render-langgraph-diagrams.mts
scripts.openapi:export: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/export-openapi.mts
scripts.auth:apply-pg: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/apply-lab-auth-pg.mts --seed
scripts.db:migrate-nomenclature: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-nomenclature-bd.mts
scripts.db:migrate-entity-domain: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-entity-domain-prefix.mts
scripts.db:migrate-simplify-names: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-simplify-table-names.mts
scripts.db:cleanup-legacy: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/cleanup-legacy-schemas.mts
scripts.db:verify-nomenclature: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/verify-bd-nomenclature.mts
scripts.db:migrate-ientityid: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-entity-ientityid.mts
scripts.auth:seed-user: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/seed-lab-auth-user.mts
scripts.auth:seed-vrestrepo: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/seed-vrestrepo.mts
scripts.auth:seed-permissions: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/seed-lab-permissions.mts
scripts.db:sync-runtime-data: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/sync-runtime-data.mts
scripts.db:consolidate-schemas: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/consolidate-bd-lab.mts && npx tsx scripts/consolidate-bd-paty.mts
scripts.db:consolidate-isadoc: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/consolidate-bd-paty.mts
scripts.db:consolidate-tipoconsulta: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/consolidate-tipoconsulta.mts
scripts.catalog:build: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/build-api-catalog.mts
scripts.catalog:sync-pg: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/sync-api-catalog-pg.mts
scripts.entity:seed: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/seed-entity-store.mts
scripts.catalog:bootstrap: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/bootstrap-entity-catalog.mts
scripts.tickets:migrate-store: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-tickets-from-isa-doc.mts
scripts.paty:restore-isa-doc-store: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/restore-paty-isa-doc-store.mts
scripts.db:audit-tables: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/audit-bd-tables.mts
scripts.backup:export: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/export-backup.mts
scripts.bitacora:migrate-patyia: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-bitacora-patyia.mts
scripts.bitacora:migrate-clientesis: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-bitacora-clientesis.mts
scripts.imgbb:migrate-map: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-imgbb-map-to-store.mts
scripts.tickets:migrate-mermaid: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/migrate-mermaid-sources.mts
